name: google-old-favicons-extension
description: Chrome extension that restores old-style Google app favicons in open tabs.

scripts.build:unpacked: npm run build && rm -rf unpacked/classic-workspace-favicons && mkdir -p unpacked/classic-workspace-favicons && cp -R manifest.json dist assets icons unpacked/classic-workspace-favicons/
scripts.package: npm run build:unpacked && rm -f classic-workspace-favicons.zip && cd unpacked/classic-workspace-favicons && zip -r ../../classic-workspace-favicons.zip . -x '*.DS_Store'
